free_text: Measurements of energy integrated cross sections for
radionuclides using neutron beams with an energy range
WNR Facility at the LANSCE accelerator
800 MeV protons at W target at LANSCE
White neutron beam, practical energy range
High purity Ge detectors plus pulse height
analyzers with computer data acquisition systems were
used to collect the gamma-ray spectra for gamma rays
with energies in the range 0-3 MeV.
